client-plugin.title: Client Plugin Entry Point
client-plugin.summary: The Pulsar `IPlugin` implementation that boots the plugin inside the Space Engineers game client and owns the client-side configuration object.

client-settings.title: Client Settings UI Framework
client-settings.summary: A declarative framework that turns the client `Config` into an in-game settings dialog: typed UI elements, layouts, data binding, change persistence and the settings screen itself.

server-plugin.title: Server Plugin Entry Point
server-plugin.summary: The dedicated-server plugin entry point and its XML-serialized performance configuration, loaded by Magnetar / Quasar.

shared-plugin-core.title: Shared Plugin Core
shared-plugin-core.summary: Code shared by both the client and server plugins: the `Common` bootstrap that applies patches and wires up logging/config, plus the `ICommonPlugin` and `IPluginConfig` contracts.

logging.title: Logging
logging.summary: An environment-agnostic logger abstraction with a shared message formatter, so the same patch code can log on both the client and the dedicated server.

tools.title: Shared Tools & Data Structures
tools.summary: The reusable toolbox the patches build on: time-bounded caches, reader/writer-locked collections, Harmony IL/transpiler helpers, IL verification, hashing, object pools and the assembly publicizer support types.

patch-infrastructure.title: Patch Infrastructure
patch-infrastructure.summary: `PatchHelpers`: discovers every Harmony patch class, applies them in a controlled order, and verifies that the targeted game code still matches what the patches expect.

merge-and-paste.title: Grid Merge & Paste Patches
merge-and-paste.summary: Suppresses redundant conveyor and world updates while grids are merged, pasted or moved between grid groups, making those operations dramatically faster.

conveyor.title: Conveyor System Patches
conveyor.summary: Caches conveyor-network reachability and pathfinding results and avoids redundant `IsWorking` recomputation, cutting the cost of large conveyor systems on capital ships and bases.

physics.title: Physics Patches
physics.summary: Havok and physics-engine optimizations: a fixed Havok thread count, a faster `RigidBody` getter and a better-complexity cluster reordering algorithm.

safe-zone.title: Safe Zone Patches
safe-zone.summary: Caches the frequently-called safe-zone checks (`IsSafe`, `IsActionAllowed`) and replaces `IsOutside` with an allocation-free implementation.

keen-overhead-removal.title: Keen Overhead Removal
keen-overhead-removal.summary: Removes constant background overhead baked into the game: explicit `GC.Collect` pauses, the EOS P2P `UpdateStats` core load and the Mod API call-statistics rewriter.

memory-allocation.title: Memory Allocation Patches
memory-allocation.summary: Reduces GC pressure from hot paths: a cached `MyDefinitionId.ToString`, less frequent block-limit sync and allocation-free voxel material lookups.

world-loading.title: World Loading Patches
world-loading.summary: Speeds up world load by caching compiled mods and in-game scripts, and rate-limits the blueprint-not-found log flooding from `GetBlueprintDefinition`.

simulation-and-blocks.title: Simulation & Block Patches
simulation-and-blocks.summary: Assorted per-block and per-subsystem fixes: turret targeting allocations, block access-right caching, wind-turbine atmosphere caching, PB block-ownership sync, disabled projected blocks, server-side footprint/wheel-trail removal and LCD surface tweaks.

tests.title: Tests
tests.summary: Unit tests for the shared tooling.
